languages.text: {n}Легкие отказываются подчиняться, как бы вы ни пытались вернуть их под свой контроль. Губы остаются недвижимы, сомкнутые неведомой силой.{/n}
{n}Your lungs refuse to obey, no matter how hard you try to bring them back under your control. Your lips remain frozen, sealed shut by an unknown force.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Легкие отказываются подчиняться, как бы вы ни пытались вернуть их под свой контроль. Губы остаются недвижимы, сомкнутые неведомой силой.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Your lungs refuse to obey, no matter how hard you try to bring them back under your control. Your lips remain frozen, sealed shut by an unknown force.{/n}
{n}Your lungs refuse to obey, no matter how hard you try to bring them back under your control. Your lips remain frozen, sealed shut by an unknown force.{/n}
{n}Your lungs refuse to obey, no matter how hard you try to bring them back under your control. Your lips remain frozen, sealed shut by an unknown force.{/n}

languages.text: {n}肺はどんなに努力しても、自分のコントロール下に収まろうとしない。唇は凍りつき、未知の力によって閉じられている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your lungs refuse to obey, no matter how hard you try to bring them back under your control. Your lips remain frozen, sealed shut by an unknown force.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}肺はどんなに努力しても、自分のコントロール下に収まろうとしない。唇は凍りつき、未知の力によって閉じられている。{/n}

languages.text: {n}无论你多么努力想重新夺回控制权，你的肺部都拒绝服从。你的嘴唇依然僵硬，被一种未知的力量死死封住。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your lungs refuse to obey, no matter how hard you try to bring them back under your control. Your lips remain frozen, sealed shut by an unknown force.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}无论你多么努力想重新夺回控制权，你的肺部都拒绝服从。你的嘴唇依然僵硬，被一种未知的力量死死封住。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tus pulmones se niegan a obedecer, por más que intentas recuperar el control sobre ellos. Tus labios permanecen inmóviles, sellados por una fuerza desconocida.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your lungs refuse to obey, no matter how hard you try to bring them back under your control. Your lips remain frozen, sealed shut by an unknown force.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tus pulmones se niegan a obedecer, por más que intentas recuperar el control sobre ellos. Tus labios permanecen inmóviles, sellados por una fuerza desconocida.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Deine Lunge verweigert dir ihren Dienst, egal, wie sehr du versuchst, die Kontrolle über sie zurückzuerlangen. Deine gefrorenen Lippen bleiben durch eine unbekannte Macht versiegelt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your lungs refuse to obey, no matter how hard you try to bring them back under your control. Your lips remain frozen, sealed shut by an unknown force.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Deine Lunge verweigert dir ihren Dienst, egal, wie sehr du versuchst, die Kontrolle über sie zurückzuerlangen. Deine gefrorenen Lippen bleiben durch eine unbekannte Macht versiegelt.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vos poumons refusent de vous obéir, malgré tous vos efforts pour en reprendre le contrôle. Vos lèvres, closes par une force inconnue, restent figées.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your lungs refuse to obey, no matter how hard you try to bring them back under your control. Your lips remain frozen, sealed shut by an unknown force.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vos poumons refusent de vous obéir, malgré tous vos efforts pour en reprendre le contrôle. Vos lèvres, closes par une force inconnue, restent figées.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Onları tekrar kontrol altına almak için ne kadar uğraşırsan uğraş, akciğerlerin itaat etmeyi reddediyor. Dudakların bilinmeyen bir güç tarafından mühürlenmiş, donmuş hâlde kalıyor.{/n}
